rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM RICHARD SOMMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the incorrect form of proof of service was filed (not the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120 with the completed proof of service on the reserse side), as the petitioner is the sole interested party. Commissions paid to the Probate Referee also do not appear to agree with the amounts shown on the I&As that were filed; however, as the petitioner is the sole interested party, it is presumed that the correct Probate Referee's commissions were paid by the attorneys, for which she seeks authority to reimburse them.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LYNN MCKANNAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine: (1) if the amended petition filed on 12/4/18 for a hearing on 12/12/18 should be disregarded and (2) if the notice allegedly mailed on 11/5/18 for the 12/12/18 hearing (when the hearing had not yet been continued to 12/12/18 as of 11/5/18) should be waived (if the party or parties entitled to notice waive notice).
